mood: Gritty, tactile, snarky, civic, newsprint, deadpan Boston

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento-style editorial grid. Heavy use of CSS grid with asymmetric column spans (e.g., 8-col hero, 4-col sidebar).
spacing_and_layout.borders: Exposed skeleton. Use pure 1px or 2px solid black borders (border-collapse style) to separate sections like a vintage newspaper.
spacing_and_layout.corners: rounded-none. No soft corners allowed. Sharp, printed edges.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Neo-brutalist offset shadows. shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1A1A1A] for cards and interactive elements.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous internal padding for reading (p-6 to p-8), but tight data tables.

component_rules.masthead: Magazine/Newspaper style. Huge centered or left-aligned typography. Include 'Vol. I', the current date, and a stark black dividing line.
component_rules.ticker_marquee: Use react-fast-marquee. Font: mono. Border top and bottom. Content: Deadpan Boston-isms and snarky updates.
component_rules.buttons: Sharp rectangles, high contrast. On hover: translate-x-[-2px] translate-y-[-2px] and increase offset shadow.
component_rules.cards_neighborhoods: Solid background, black borders, monochromatic images on hover. Display stats prominently.
component_rules.interactive_map: Leaflet + OpenStreetMap. STRICT RULE: Use a dark or muted tile layer (like CartoDB Dark Matter or Stadia Alidade Smooth Dark) to contrast heavily with the cream newsprint background. No standard bright Google Maps.
component_rules.wicked_picks_section: Editorial sidebar. Background: surface_dark (#1C1B1A) with off-white text to break the page rhythm. Serifs for the snarky commentary.

animation_interactions.hover_states: Crisp and mechanical. Invert colors (black to cream) or use stark offset shadows.
animation_interactions.transitions: Fast and direct (duration-150, ease-in-out). Avoid slow, overly smooth 'app-like' fades.
animation_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-in from bottom for grid items to mimic laying down paper sections.

image_urls.description: Boston Citgo Sign near Fenway. Use for neighborhood features or main editorial image, optionally with a grayscale/halftone CSS filter.
Gritty cobblestone street with brick buildings. Good for Southie/Back Bay category headers.
Zakim bridge photography. Excellent for 'Wicked Picks' background or footer.

media_and_assets.image_styling: Images should ideally have a CSS filter applied (e.g., grayscale, high contrast, or a slight sepia tint) to match the newsprint aesthetic. Max opacity overlay bg-black/40 if text is on top.

testing_requirements.attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, and navigation MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='map-filter-assault', data-testid='neighborhood-card-southie'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Avoid standard Vercel/SaaS templates entirely. Do not center grids uniformly. Create visual tension.
Do not use generic sans-serif fonts like Inter. Stick to Playfair, Oswald, and IBM Plex.
Apply the newsprint_bg texture as a low-opacity background image to the main body to give a tactile feel (mix-blend-multiply works well).
Build the 'Wicked Picks' section as a stark editorial column, maybe spanning 1/3 of the page, full height alongside the map or data.
Override Shadcn component radii to rounded-none and apply solid borders.
For the crime map, use Leaflet. Dark tiles are critical for the gritty look. Make markers distinct but not celebratory.
